title: Senior Fleet Manager at KTC Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at KTC Logistics
jsonLd.description:
KTC Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About KTC Logistics:
KTC Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KTC Logistics!
